purpose: Creates/updates the core course setup record: title, slug, descriptions, audience, language, level, duration, access, certificate, final test, pass threshold, thumbnail, accessibility and safety notes.
importNotes: Course may be created as DRAFT first. Publish only through approved workflow or explicit seed-published demo instruction.

purpose: Adds enhanced metadata: capacity area, CSO practice, standards, indicators, capacity gap, current practice, desired practice, K/S/M/E, course-fit decision, safeguards, and follow-up support.
importNotes: Use CAP-ADV as capacity area and STD-HRBA as standard family. HRBA is not the capacity area.

purpose: Creates five enhanced learning outcomes with capacity, practice, observable action, indicator, measurement level, assessment method, evidence type, and success criterion.
importNotes: Learner-facing views should show only the clean outcome statements, not all internal alignment metadata.

purpose: Creates the course structure: 3 modules and 6 lessons, with stable IDs, linked outcomes, learning functions, expected outputs, capacity/practice/indicator alignment, and duration.
targetScreenOrModel: Build Studio Course Outline / Module / Lesson / Lesson.alignmentMetadataJson
importNotes: Total lesson duration should align with Course Setup 90 minutes including final test/activities.

purpose: Creates all 23 Build Studio blocks with learner-facing content, block config JSON, alignment metadata, assets, answers, feedback, and accessibility notes.
importNotes: Preserve block order. The branching scenario block is the signature strategic decision block.

purpose: Creates final test settings and eight scored questions linked to outcomes and indicators, using 80% certificate threshold.
importNotes: Final test questions are scored. Lesson knowledge checks remain low-stakes.

purpose: Defines all course assets: thumbnail, lesson images, required PDFs, optional PDFs, video URL, asset paths, alt text, captions, and repo target paths.
dependsOn: Assets must exist or be generated/uploaded
required: Yes for required assets; optional rows do not block import
importNotes: Required PDFs and images should be placed under public/assets as specified.

purpose: Defines expected catalogue card, public course detail, creator preview, learner preview, certificate information, and course outline display values.
importNotes: Use for visual QA and public preview verification.

purpose: Provides QA checklist for course setup, metadata, dropdowns, outcomes, modules, blocks, branching scenario, assets, final test, previews, readiness, scope, mobile and accessibility.
importNotes: Codex should include QA results in the evidence pack.

purpose: Final prompt for Codex to import or seed the complete HRBA advocacy course using the CSV pack.
importNotes: Generated after manifest. Use after placing all CSVs in the repo folder.
